key_insight: SciReasoner turns structures into explicit, addressable tokens so a multimodal foundation model can both predict and explain structure-property relationships across proteins, molecules, and crystals.
engineering_relevance: This could improve materials discovery pipelines by combining higher prediction accuracy with traceable reasoning that helps engineers trust and debug model outputs.
method: Discretizes coordinates, topology, and periodic connectivity into a unified structure-aware vocabulary.
Uses structural tokens as evidence units for native reasoning across biology, chemistry, and materials.
Generates interpretable traces such as fragment disconnection, precursor verification, and structure-linked predictions.
evidence_signal: Across 86 benchmarks, the model reports state-of-the-art performance on 67 tasks, with expert blind review preferring or rating its reasoning traces comparable to a frontier LLM in 98% of cases.
watch_item: Because the approach depends on discrete structural tokenization, performance and interpretability may vary with representation choices and the quality of structure inputs.
paper_title: Accurate, Interdisciplinary and Transparent Structure-property Understanding with Deep Native Structural Reasoning
